summary: Telegram Noise Reduction feature verified. TelegramNotifier now only subscribes to ORDER_UPDATE events (no SIGNAL, RISK_ALERT, SYSTEM_EVENT). Weather alert service _emit() method no longer sends to Telegram. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend UI tests passed.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/strategies/weather/alerts shows total_telegram_sent=0 (weather no longer sends to Telegram)
frontend_ui_tests: Global Analytics page loads with data-testid='global-analytics-page'
Credentials section visible with Telegram Bot: Connected

critical_code_review_comments: telegram_notifier.py line 75: bus.on(EventType.ORDER_UPDATE, self._on_order_update) - correctly subscribes ONLY to ORDER_UPDATE
telegram_notifier.py: No SIGNAL, RISK_ALERT, or SYSTEM_EVENT subscriptions (grep confirms 0 matches)
weather_alert_service.py _emit() method (lines 180-201): Correctly removed Telegram dispatch - only stores in memory and logs
weather_alert_service.py: _format_telegram() static method retained for future use but _emit() no longer calls _fire()
TRADE EXECUTED format (lines 167-174) includes: Strategy, Market, Side, Price, Size, Edge - matches requirement
TRADE CLOSED format (lines 195-202) includes: Strategy, Market, Resolution, PnL, ROI - matches requirement
test_credentials: Telegram credentials configured in backend/.env (TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Telegram noise reduction feature fully verified. Key changes: (1) TelegramNotifier only subscribes to ORDER_UPDATE events at line 75 in telegram_notifier.py. (2) Weather alert service _emit() no longer dispatches to Telegram - total_telegram_sent stays 0. (3) TRADE EXECUTED format includes Edge field. (4) TRADE CLOSED handler added for status='closed' events. Settings UI shows Telegram Bot Connected, Trade Alerts ON, Signal Alerts ON, Messages Sent = 1.

features_tested.only_order_update_subscription: PASS - Code review confirms only EventType.ORDER_UPDATE subscription
